image:image.image:title: Strange Harvest Official Poster
image:image.image:caption: Official poster for the horror mockumentary Strange Harvest Occult Murder in the Inland Empire.

image:image.image:title: Strange Harvest Alternate Poster
image:image.image:caption: Alternate poster featuring the masked killer from Strange Harvest.

image:image.image:title: Crime Scene Pool Investigation
image:image.image:caption: Forensic investigators examining a drained swimming pool crime scene in Strange Harvest.

image:image.image:title: Kitchen Crime Scene Symbol
image:image.image:caption: Occult symbol painted in blood on a kitchen wall at a crime scene in Strange Harvest.

image:image.image:title: Knife Evidence
image:image.image:caption: Blood stained knife labeled as forensic evidence during a murder investigation in Strange Harvest.

image:image.image:title: Bloody Handprint Evidence
image:image.image:caption: Bloody handprint marked as forensic evidence at a crime scene in Strange Harvest.

image:image.image:title: Detective Joe Kirby Interview
image:image.image:caption: Detective Joe Kirby giving an interview about the investigation in Strange Harvest.

image:image.image:title: Detective Lexi Taylor Interview
image:image.image:caption: Detective Lexi Taylor speaking during an investigative interview in Strange Harvest.

image:image.image:title: Strange Harvest Press Poster
image:image.image:caption: Official movie poster used in the Strange Harvest press kit.
